name: Transaction Coordinator Service

shared_dependencies.reason: AI council for email drafting, deal scoring, coaching
Stripe billing for TC plan tiers
CRM system of record for agent clients

required_routes.description: Create placeholder transaction from triaged contract email
Link triaged email to an existing transaction
Find attachment email, combine photos, and send package

completion_checks: TC access readiness route accurately reports missing/present IMAP and vault-backed browser credentials
Agent portal without a transaction id shows the intake workspace with readiness, triage, and suggested transaction matches
Email triage stores preview text and message identity when enrichment columns are available, improving workspace routing quality
The intake workspace can create a placeholder transaction directly from a triaged contract email
The intake workspace can link a triaged email to an existing transaction and record the routing event
The intake workspace shows recent intake activity so the operator can audit routing work without leaving the portal
The intake workspace exposes manual document validation and dry-run upload controls before live filing
The intake workspace can launch a dry-run intake for a target address before live filing credentials are used
Failed workspace QA checks can be converted into transaction-scoped document requests without leaving the portal
The intake workspace can seed the known TC env defaults automatically while leaving secret values for manual entry
The intake workspace detects when secret envs already exist and does not falsely present them as missing
The intake workspace shows a managed-env snapshot so runtime env presence and sync state are visible together
First live transaction (6453 Mahogany Peak) created and tracked in DB
Email triage picks up TC-related emails and routes to correct transaction
Deadline tracker fires reminders at correct intervals
Agent portal accessible and shows transaction status
GLVAR dues check runs monthly without manual intervention
Billing tracks per-transaction and subscription revenue
The intake workspace shows active files as red/yellow/green transaction cards with client/contact context and hover summaries of what is happening
Clicking a workspace transaction opens the exact action surface, and the transaction detail page provides direct jump targets for approvals, alerts, and document review
The intake workspace can find an email, combine photo attachments into one PDF, and send the package from the portal without curl
The transaction detail page shows a visible due-diligence / contingency countdown when a file is under time pressure
The transaction detail page shows a todo list with owner tags so Adam can see what the system is handling versus what needs his action
The alert surface supports a one-click handle-in-the-morning snooze that keeps escalation follow-up alive
